title: eragrostis rigida
intro: Eragrostis rigida, also known as rigid love grass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to Australia and is commonly found in dry woodlands and grasslands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis rigida include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or using them in a decoction, and can be consumed as a tea or used topically in the form of a salve or poultice.
